note: 2018 cover used RibMon; missing from 2018 species_list but present in 2025 as Ribes montigenum.
2018 cover used RubIda; missing from 2018 species_list but present in 2025 as Rubus idaeus.
2018 cover used lowercase "engelmann"; species_list has "Engelmann" — case mismatch.
V. californicum and V. tenuipetalum are synonymized in the RMBL flora; the 2018 list explicitly notes *syn. = V. californicum var. californicum. Treat all Veratrum samples as V. tenuipetalum.
